title: Test 1 - Basic Default Settings
script: [Visual: space stars cosmos galaxy] The universe is vast and beautiful. Stars twinkle in the night sky. Galaxies spin across billions of light-years.

title: Test 2 - Custom Text Styling
script: [Visual: ocean waves sunset beach] The ocean waves crash gently against the shore at sunset. Golden light reflects across the water surface. Seagulls soar gracefully through the warm evening sky.

title: Test 3 - Music Volume Control
script: [Visual: forest trees nature landscape] Tall trees stretch toward the blue sky above. Sunlight filters through the green canopy creating dancing shadows. A gentle breeze rustles through the leaves and branches.

title: Test 4 - Portrait Mode No Text
script: [Visual: city skyline night lights] The city lights sparkle against the dark night sky. Tall buildings illuminate the urban landscape below. Stars compete with streetlights in this metropolitan scene.

title: Test 5 - Inline Text Toggle
script: [Visual: mountain peak sunrise] The morning sun rises behind the mountain peak. [Text: off] Golden light paints the rocky cliffs with warm colors. [Text: on] Eagles soar high above the valley searching for their morning meal.

title: Test 6 - Multiple Silent Visuals
script: [Visual: fireworks celebration][Visual: crowd cheering festival][Visual: confetti party balloons]
